title: This Is My Year
overview: Connor Miller is a screenwriter, or at least she wants to be. After 3 years of living in Los Angeles' "valley" she moves to Hollywood to give it one last shot. There, she wrestles with the costs of chasing a dream and struggles to keep her eye on the prize during her "make-it-or-break-it" year.
